name: Joe's Stone Crab
reasoningTrace:
Resolved Joe's Stone Crab → joesstonecrab.com.
Fetched seasonal landing page — reservation CTA prominent but seasonal closure banner confusing.
Phone (305) 673-0365 in header on desktop; hidden in mobile hamburger.
Trust signals strong: century-old brand, Miami Beach address present.
Conversion gap: no click-to-call on mobile hero during stone crab season push.
Speed: image-heavy gallery — acceptable on Wi-Fi, heavy on LTE.
Overall 58/100 — iconic brand held back by mobile conversion friction.

snapshot.title: Joe's Stone Crab | Miami Beach
snapshot.description: World-famous stone crab and seafood since 1913. Miami Beach institution.
snapshot.rawText: Joe's Stone Crab Miami Beach. Reservations recommended. Famous for stone crab claws, hash browns, and key lime pie. Open seasonally for stone crab October through May. Call (305) 673-0365. Located on South Beach. Takeout and gift cards available.

clarity.reason: Brand is clear to locals but seasonal hours and closure messaging confuses first-time visitors.

trust.reason: Strong heritage story and Miami Beach address — customers trust the name.

mobile.reason: Phone and reservations sit behind the mobile menu instead of one-tap actions on the hero.

speed.reason: Hero photography is beautiful but large — expect slow LCP on mobile networks.

conversion.reason: Reservation link exists but no tap-to-call for walk-in questions during peak season.

localSeo.reason: Miami Beach and South Beach appear but could lean harder into 'stone crab season' local queries.

topFixes: Add tap-to-call and 'Book a table' side-by-side on mobile hero.
Clarify seasonal hours in one line under the headline.
Compress hero images for faster mobile load without losing the Beach vibe.
